title: UPTET 2026 Correction / Edit Form for Primary and Junior Level
short_info: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) has released the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPTET 2026 Exam Date Notice. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 27/03/2026 to 03/05/2026.candidates should read the UPTET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPTET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Primary and Junior Level, information and other types of information and then apply. rows: Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPTET 2026 Apply Correction / Edit Form | Syllabus Download

Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) has released the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPTET 2026 Exam Date Notice. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 27/03/2026 to 03/05/2026.candidates should read the UPTET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPTET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Primary and Junior Level, information and other types of information and then apply.

tables.table_name: UPTET 2021 Primary I to V & Junior VI to VIII Eligibility UPTET Languages Available: Hindi, English, Urdu, Sanskrit
rows: Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with Passed / Appeared DELED (Final Year) Exam OR Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 50% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) OR Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 45% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) (As per NCTE Norms) OR 10+2 Intermediate 50% Marks with 4 Year B.ElEd OR More Details Read Notification.

Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with 50% Marks with B.Ed / B.Ed Special Exam Passed / Appearing (Final Year) OR Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with BTC Training 2 Year Exam Passed OR 10+2 Intermediate Exam with 50% Marks and B.LEd 4 Year Course OR 10+2 Inter Exam with 50% Marks and B.SC Ed Exam Passed Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 45% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) (As per NCTE Norms) OR More Details Read Notification.
